body_html:
A three-bottle recovery stack for distance runners, riders and weekend warriors — built entirely from the Vivid range. Turmeric for the inflammation of long training blocks, MSM for joints and connective tissue under load, and L-Glutamine for muscle recovery between sessions.

What's inside

  • Vivid Turmeric Plus — 1 capsule with breakfast and 1 after long sessions. Standardised curcumin with black pepper for absorption; the exact milligrams are on the label, where they belong.
  • Vivid MSM — 1 capsule twice daily with food. Sulphur for the connective tissue and joints doing the actual work.
  • Vivid L-Glutamine — 1 scoop post-training. The amino acid your muscles and gut lining draw on hardest during heavy training weeks.

Why we bundled it

Recovery isn't one mechanism — it's inflammation control, tissue repair and refuelling. Each bottle covers one leg honestly, at the dose declared on its own label.

The honest bit: no stack outruns poor sleep or a training plan without rest weeks. If a niggle is sharp rather than stiff, see a physio before a supplement. Questions? Message a consultant.

A three-bottle stack for Gauteng's September–November pollen storm — quercetin, mullein and buffered vitamin C from the Vivid range. Support a calmer histamine response without the antihistamine drowsiness.

What's inside

  • Vivid Quercetin Complex — 1 capsule with breakfast. The plant flavonoid most studied for seasonal and histamine support; dose declared per capsule on the label.
  • Vivid Mullein — 1–2 capsules with lunch. The traditional herb for airway comfort through peak pollen weeks.
  • Vivid Buffered C — 1 capsule with dinner. Gentle, stomach-friendly vitamin C to round out daily immune support.

Why we bundled it

Highveld spring is a pollen event. Starting the stack two to three weeks before September beats starting the morning your eyes itch.

The honest bit: supplements support a normal histamine response — they don't replace prescribed treatment for serious allergies or asthma. If you're wheezing, see a professional. Unsure? Ask a consultant first.

A four-bottle stack for women navigating perimenopause — built entirely from the Vivid range. Agnus Castus for cycle balance, Sage for the heat, Maca for energy and hormonal support, and Griffonia 5-HTP for the mood-and-sleep piece.

What's inside

  • Vivid Agnus Castus — 1 capsule each morning. The traditional herb for cycle and hormonal balance support.
  • Vivid Sage — 1 capsule daily. The classic botanical for menopause-related heat comfort.
  • Vivid Maca — 1 capsule with breakfast. Energy and hormonal balance support for the flat, grey weeks.
  • Vivid Griffonia (5-HTP) — 1 evening capsule. Serotonin support for mood-coloured, shallow sleep.

Why we bundled it

Perimenopause rarely arrives as one symptom. This stack covers the four most common asks at our counter — each at the dose declared on its own label.

The honest bit: do not combine 5-HTP with antidepressant medication (SSRIs and related) without your prescriber's guidance — that interaction is real. Severe or sudden symptoms deserve a doctor, not a bigger stack. Message a consultant and we'll say so plainly.
